# Maurya Soni
> Frontend Developer with 1+ years experience. Specializes in React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS. Employed at Krishaweb. B.Tech IT, Charusat University 2024. Based in Ahmedabad, India.

## Skills
HTML, CSS, SCSS, Tailwind CSS, ReactJS, Next.js, JavaScript, Node.js, MongoDB, Sequelize

## Work Experience
- Frontend Developer at Krishaweb (May 2024 – Present), Ahmedabad, India. Builds responsive, high-performance web interfaces using React and Next.js. Works across the full frontend lifecycle from design handoff to production deployment.

## Education
- B.Tech Information Technology, Charusat University (2020 – 2024)
- HSC, Nirman High School, Vastrapur (2018 – 2020)
- SSC, St. Kabir School, Drive-In (2006 – 2018)

## Projects
- Freshly: A recipe discovery app built with Next.js. Users can browse, search, and save recipes with a clean, responsive UI. Focused on SSG for performance and SEO.
- Leave App: A leave management system built on the MERN Stack. Allows employees to apply for leave and managers to approve or reject requests with role-based access control.
- FoodMart: A food delivery platform built on the MERN Stack. Includes product listings, cart management, and order flow for an end-to-end ordering experience.
